description_long: This is a brown slip-on shoe with a low profile and a streamlined, casual design. The upper appears to be made of synthetic or genuine leather, featuring visible stitching along the seams and around the toe area for added durability and style. There is a subtle decorative patch with a stitched pattern on the side, and the shoe lacks any laces or fasteners, indicating an easy slip-on construction. The collar is slightly elasticated for comfort and a snug fit, while the sole is thin, flat, and likely made of rubber or a similar material, providing flexibility and grip. The interior is dark, suggesting a soft lining, and the overall build is lightweight and suitable for everyday urban wear. The shoe is in pristine condition, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A brown slip-on shoe with visible stitching, a decorative side patch, and a flat rubber sole, designed for casual urban use. The shoe is new and features a comfortable, elasticated collar.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown leather-like upper, decorative stitched patch, and detailed seam work.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, central seam, and clean, unadorned vamp.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same stitched patch and seam details as the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel counter, simple back seam, and the open collar.
